# Asserted Memory

Gridlock guidance the user has explicitly asserted. Scoped to the
`reviewer-bot` agent so it exercises `entryMatchesScope`'s `agent` key
alongside the `current` belief filter (`asserted` counts as current per
Phase 1A).
